title: [InstCombine] Optimise the expression `(C && A) || (!C && B)` with `FoldOrOfLogicalAnds`
author: Rajveer100
description:
Resolves #174937

This simplification will help instcombine optimise the expression (and similar cases) to `select C, A, B`.

[Alive2 Proof](https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/B5pub9)

tests.test_body:
declare void @use(i1)

define i1 @or_and1_multiuse(i1 %a, i1 %b, i1 %c) {
  %notb = xor i1 %b, true
  %cond = and i1 %notb, %c
  call void @use(i1 %cond)
  %r = select i1 %cond, i1 %a, i1 %b
  ret i1 %r
}

comments.author: Rajveer100
comments.body:
I’ve refactored the code and added a few more tests. Please let me know if this works.

Also, there's actually another case that can be a possible follow up:

```
(C && A) | (C && B) => C && (A | B)
```
